data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of an identity handoff audit trail, which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, the provided evidence does not include any information or records that demonstrate the existence of such an audit trail. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement as there is no evidence supporting the fulfillment of this specific need.
gaps: No evidence of an identity handoff audit trail being created or maintained.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add audit trail validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that an identity handoff audit trail is recorded for booking transfers.
